name: Airbrake
description: Error monitoring and performance tracking platform. Connects to the Airbrake API to verify project configuration and error monitoring capabilities.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies connectivity to Airbrake by listing projects accessible to the API key.

checks.name: Error Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies that Airbrake error monitoring is active by checking error groups across all projects.
